yaml_definition:
name: list_orders
description: Retrieve and search orders with optional filters for order name, ID, user, and date
method: GET
url: /api/orders
parameters:
  type: object
  properties:
    name:
      type: string
      description: 订单名称 - filter by order/product name
      in: query
    id:
      type: string
      description: 订单ID - filter by order ID
      in: query
    user:
      type: string
      description: 下单人 - filter by the person who placed the order
      in: query
    date:
      type: string
      description: 下单时间 - filter by order date
      in: query
  required: []
response:
  type: object
  properties:
    data:
      type: array
      description: List of order records
      items:
        type: object
        properties:
          id:
            type: string
            description: Unique order identifier
          name:
            type: string
            description: Product name
          user:
            type: string
            description: Person who placed the order
          amount:
            type: integer
            description: Order amount in currency
          status:
            type: string
            description: Order status (paid, shipped, pending, cancelled)
          time:
            type: string
            description: Order date in YYYY-MM-DD format
    total:
      type: integer
      description: Total number of orders matching the query
name: list_orders
description: Retrieve and search orders with optional filters for order name, ID, user, and date

name.description: 订单名称 - filter by order/product name

id.description: 订单ID - filter by order ID

user.description: 下单人 - filter by the person who placed the order

date.description: 下单时间 - filter by order date

total.description: Total number of orders matching the query
